subcodes.first_line: He hath made mention of His servant at this moment in the Kingdom of Names and Attributes, that he may rejoice within himself at the most exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده حینئذ فی ملکوت الاسماء و الصفات لیستبشر فی نفسه علی اعلی المقام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
